mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_course_user_learn ( login_id, start_time, end_time, state, course_id, course_order_no, create_time ) VALUES
( #{item.loginId}, #{item.startTime}, #{item.endTime}, #{item.status}, #{item.courseId}, #{item.courseOrderNo}, #{item.createTime} )
mapper.select: select c.id, c.name, c.for_user, c.course_type_id, c.grade_name, c.grade_id, c.status, c.login_id, c.login_user_name, c.start_time, c.end_time, c.pic, c.total_minute, c.online_time, c.chapter_count, c.teacher_names from t_course_user_learn cul left join t_course c on cul.course_id = c.id where cul.login_id = #{loginId}
